item.title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text message sender software helps in how to broadcast the massive sms to targeted marketing, and provide facility to keeping in touch with the clients. Bulk messaging from PC to mobile is an innovative technique for composing and sending text messaging to national and international mobile networks at one time. Software need not requires any internet connection for sending promotional, invitation, job alerts. Software supports Windows operating system such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8. Utility works with mobile phone connected to Microsoft ActiveSync and windows mobile device center and send messages to all GSM or CDMA mobile phones globally. Features: * Software is able to sending text messages to all national or international numbers. * Tool can sends text message in any language that supported by Unicode. * Bulk, messages sender utility is compatible with all Windows based Mobile Phone handsets that is supported by Microsoft ActiveSync and Windows Mobile Device Center. * Software is not need to internet connection is required to send SMS. * Tool is used for messaging to individuals or list of phone numbers from PC to mobile. * Bulk SMS messaging utility used to sends infinite numbers of messages. * Utility has interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI), easy to use and not need any specific technical skills for operating this utility. * Tool does not require any internet connection for messaging. * Utility compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text message sender software helps in how to broadcast the massive sms to targeted marketing, and provide facility to keeping in touch with the clients. Software need not requires any internet connection for sending promotional, invitation, job alerts. Software supports Windows operating system such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8. [read more]

item.title: FAT Partition Data Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition Data Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]

FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]

item.title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. Features: * NTFS partition rescue tool retrieve lost MBR, DBR and corrupted MFT file system. * Windows Vista files recovery tool can easily repair corrupt hard disks and any kind of storage media. * Tool can also recover encrypted or compressed NTFS files. * Vista partition recovery tool provides interactive graphical user interface and does not require any technical skill to operate it.

[read more]
item.description:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. [read more]

Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Professional Files Recovery Software easily introduced by company www.filesrecovery.in that is used to regain lost pictures from storage device which gets formatted because of virus attacks on different types of memory card available in market.

item.title: FAT Files Salvage Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Files Salvage Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Data recovery is also possible when data is corrupted due to software or hardware malfunction, crashed storage media like EIDE, IDE, SCSI, ATA, power failure, virus attack and damaged hard disk or drive. FAT partition data file rescue software is quick solution to restore lost data from storage media. FAT data restoration utility can support windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can restore data recovery even files, folders and directory has been deleted after pressing (shift+Del) key or from recycle bin. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Tool can restore data recovery even files, folders and directory has been deleted after pressing (shift+Del) key or from recycle bin. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]

FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Data recovery is also possible when data is corrupted due to software or hardware malfunction, crashed storage media like EIDE, IDE, SCSI, ATA, power failure, virus attack and damaged hard disk or drive. FAT partition data file rescue software is quick solution to restore lost data from storage media. FAT data restoration utility can support windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can restore data recovery even files, folders and directory has been deleted after pressing (shift+Del) key or from recycle bin. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]

item.title: PDA Mobile Investigation Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PDA Mobile Investigation Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
PDA Mobile Investigation Software
(Utilities)
PDA monitoring software gather all necessary information of pocket pc cell phone related to software and hardware architecture. Pocket pc forensic software is very useful for investigation agency for finding any evidence from cell phone device. PDA monitoring software quickly and safely extorts important information of Windows based mobile phone and save all information in a text file for future use. Pocket pc monitor software support all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Pocket pc investigation software is designed using an advanced algorithm that efficiently calculates the remaining battery time, based on your usage profile and provide details of last used application. PDA forensic utility deeply scrutinizes and extracts all information related to operating system registry. PDA surveillance software supports all type of windows based mobile phone like E-ten M600 Pocket PC Phone, Audiovox PPC, Anextek, Asus Pocket PC Phone, HTC MteoR Smart phone, Asus Pocket PC Phone, i-mate Smartflip, Gigabyte gSmart i120, Audiovox Thera, Carrier Devices i-Mate Smartphone, Hitachi Pocket PC phone, Pantech PH-S8000T smartphone, Motorola i930, Dopod StrTrk S300, Samsung SCH-i730 Pocket PC phone, GSMK Cryptophone, HP iPAQ hw6515 and other brands. Features: * Pocket pc monitor software capable to detect hardware information from any type of Windows based mobile phone. * Quickly extract SIM, phonebook, contacts, battery status, manufacture detail and other useful information within few minutes. * User interactive GUI interface and small size of software make comfortable with all pocket pc cell phone. * PDA surveillance tool generate reports that are very helpful in forensic investigation of pocket pc mobile.

[read more]

PDA Mobile Investigation Software

[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Mobile GSM Phonebook backup tool is the best alternate to the expensive and time consuming recovery devices to rescue deleted messages and contacts from 3G/GSM mobile phone. Locked mobile sim card data recovery utility efficiently restores lost messages from sim card even when Sim Card Not Recognized or Insert the Sim card messages are displayed on your mobile screen. Freeware simcard data recovery tool rescue sim card general information like IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity) number, ICC-ID (Integrated circuit card identity) number, SPN (service provider name) and PIN (personal identification number) etc. Sim card information reader tool can securely retrieve lost mobile saved messages or contact numbers and supports all windows operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Unerase simcard lost data utility provides advance and enhanced recovery services to rescue lost mobile information in less turnaround time. USB sim card reader utility provides assurance for recovery of all your deleted messages from inbox, outbox, sent item or draft with exact data and time and also sender or receiver name. Features: * Locked mobile sim card data recovery software recovers corrupted or erased phone book history from any USB sim card reader device like Nokia, LG, Motorola, Samsung or Soy Ericson etc. * Sim card contacts reader software supports all network providers like Vodafone, Airtel, Idea, BSNL or MTNL etc. * SIM card message recovery solution also provides sim card information like IMSI, ICC-ID, SPN or PIN number. * Mobile simcard data backup program supports all windows operating system along with windows vista.

[read more]
item.description:
Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Mobile GSM Phonebook backup tool is the best alternate to the expensive and time consuming recovery devices to rescue deleted messages and contacts from 3G/GSM mobile phone. USB sim card reader utility provides assurance for recovery of all your deleted messages from inbox, outbox, sent item or draft with exact data and time and also sender or receiver name. [read more]
